personal_profile.headline: Platform Engineer
personal_profile.summary: Engineer with platform, backend, and reliability delivery experience.

bullets.text: Architected Python services on AWS with Terraform automation, cutting deployment time 35% for platform teams.
Improved Kubernetes reliability, mentored engineers, and drove platform adoption across backend teams.
Built Python and AWS backend services that improved reliability by 28% for customer APIs.
Built a Python API optimization that reduced latency 60% for one backend service.
Maintained internal dashboards and responded to bug reports.
